title: 泰国政府拟进口俄罗斯原油，汽油价格或将上调
desc: The government is ready to purchase crude oil from Russia and has signalled plans to raise petrol prices after the diesel price cap ends on Monday, while officials have also moved to clarify concerns over rising refining margins.
desc_original: The government is ready to purchase crude oil from Russia and has signalled plans to raise petrol prices after the diesel price cap ends on Monday, while officials have also moved to clarify concerns over rising refining margins.
summary_cn: 泰国政府已准备好从俄罗斯购买原油，以应对全球能源压力。随着周一柴油价格上限补补贴政策结束，官方释放出上调汽油价格的信号。与此同时，相关部门官员正就炼油利润率上涨及其引发的公众担忧进行澄清。该举措旨在平抑能源成本，但也可能直接导致在泰生活成本上升。

title: 泰股大盘受地缘政治阴云困扰，指数波动明显
desc: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) ended February with high hopes at 1,528.26 points, up 15% from the month before. The post-election rally continued after the Bhumjaithai Party won convincingly and moved quickly to form a coalition with a solid majority.
desc_original: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) ended February with high hopes at 1,528.26 points, up 15% from the month before. The post-election rally continued after the Bhumjaithai Party won convincingly and moved quickly to form a coalition with a solid majority.
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易所（SET）在二月收盘表现强劲，涨幅达15%，主要受大选后泰自豪党（Bhumjaithai Party）获胜并快速筹建多数派执政联盟的利好驱动。然而，国际地缘政治风险加剧，阴云笼罩股市，尽管目前政治局面稳定，但外部战争风险仍对大盘未来的持续增长潜力构成挑战。

title: 泰国自建房市场潜力巨大，吸引大型开发商入场
desc: Although the self-built home market is sizeable, with an annual value of up to 200 billion baht, residential developers had largely overlooked the segment until last year when a handful of large and mid-sized developers entered the fray.
desc_original: Although the self-built home market is sizeable, with an annual value of up to 200 billion baht, residential developers had largely overlooked the segment until last year when a handful of large and mid-sized developers entered the fray.
summary_cn: 泰国自建房市场规模每年高达2000亿泰铢，长期以来该领域一直被主要开发商忽视。然而，随着市场竞争加剧，从去年起一批中大型房地产开发商开始入场。这一细分市场的爆发反映了泰国居民住房需求的多样化，也预示着房地产行业未来在定制化住宅方向上的增长潜力。

title: 应对中东冲突影响，泰旅局拟推旅游刺激措施
desc: To mitigate the tourism impact from the Middle East conflict, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) plans to propose to the cabinet a stimulus measure for the short-haul and domestic markets, as well as setting up a "war room" in collaboration with private operators.
desc_original: To mitigate the tourism impact from the Middle East conflict, the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) plans to propose to the cabinet a stimulus measure for the short-haul and domestic markets, as well as setting up a "war room" in collaboration with private operators.
summary_cn: 为减轻中东冲突对泰国旅游业造成的负面影响，泰国国家旅游局（TAT）计划向内阁提交针对短途市场和国内市场的刺激方案。此外，泰旅局还将与私人运营商合作建立“应急室”（War Room），实时监控行业波动。该举措旨在填补长途游客减少的缺口，优先保障国内旅游经济稳定性。

title: 商会大学：中东冲突或致泰国GDP缩减2.31%
desc: A worst-case scenario for the Middle East conflict, which is war dragging on without a clear end, would reduce Thai GDP by 2.31 percentage points, according to the Center for Economic and Business Forecasting at the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).
desc_original: A worst-case scenario for the Middle East conflict, which is war dragging on without a clear end, would reduce Thai GDP by 2.31 percentage points, according to the Center for Economic and Business Forecasting at the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC).
summary_cn: 泰国商会大学（UTCC）经济与商务预测中心指出，在中东冲突演变为旷日持久战争的最坏情况下，泰国GDP增长可能被削减2.31个百分点。该评估主要基于能源成本飙升、出口受阻及全球消费信心下降等因素。这对于正处于恢复期的泰国经济增长目标构成了重大挑战。

title: 遭袭货轮上3名泰国籍船员确认生还
desc_original: Three Thai sailors remain alive aboard the damaged cargo ship MV Mayuree Naree after it was attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, according to Adm Thadawut Thatphithakkul, chief of staff of the Royal Thai Navy.
title_cn: 被袭货船上3名泰国籍船员确认生还
summary_cn: 泰国皇家海军参谋长塔达武海军上将（Adm Thadawut Thatphithakkul）证实，其所属的受损货轮“MV Mayuree Naree”号在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）遭受袭击后，船上的三名泰国籍船员目前依然生还。军方正在密切关注局势进展并协调后续安全事宜。此次袭击凸显了该航道日益严峻的安全局势及对泰国航运人员的影响。

title: Thai crypto scandals shake investor trust
desc_original: Two high-profile cryptocurrency scandals involving Worawat Naknawdee, a prominent digital asset investor, and Kampanat Vimolnoht, a former director linked to a venture capital arm of Kasikornbank, have sparked debate among Thai investors over trust, insider networks and risks in the fast-growing crypto market.
title_cn: 泰国两起数字货币丑闻重挫投资者信心
summary_cn: 近期两起备受关注的加密货币丑闻引发了广泛讨论。涉事人员包括知名数字资产投资者 Worawat Naknawdee，以及曾任职于开泰银行（Kasikornbank）旗下风投机构的前董事 Kampanat Vimolnoht。这些事件暴露了泰国高速发展的加密市场在内部网络、信任机制及投资风险方面的漏洞，促使泰国投资者重新评估数字货币投资的安全性及市场透明度。

title: Tattoo artist accuses Russian tourist of groping her in Pattaya, CCTV captures incident
desc_original: A tattoo artist files a complaint at Pattaya City Police Station after accusing a Russian tourist of groping her outside her shop on Soi 5 off Pattaya Second Road, with CCTV footage submitted to police as evidence. PATTAYA, Thailand – A 23-year-old tattoo artist filed a police complaint after alleging that a Russian tourist groped her outside her shop in Pattaya, with the incident captured clearly on CCTV.
title_cn: 纹身师控诉俄罗斯游客在芭提雅对其非礼 监控录像还原过程
summary_cn: 在芭提雅二路（Pattaya Second Road）5巷，一名23岁的纹身师向芭提雅市警察局报案。她指控一名俄罗斯游客在其店铺门口对其进行猥亵摸索。受害者 Kunsiri 已将监控录像完整提交给警方作为证供。监控图像清晰记录了事发经过，目前警方正以此为线索追查嫌疑人。此类涉及外国游客的基础治安事件在当地引起关注。

title: Pattaya officials respond after couple sleeping outside shop scares off customers
desc_original: Officials from the Pattaya City Municipal Enforcement Department speak with a man and a woman found sleeping outside a shop in Pattaya after complaints from business operators that the situation was discouraging customers from entering the premises. PATTAYA, Thailand – Officers from Pattaya City Municipal Enforcement Department were called to inspect an area outside a local shop on March 13.
title_cn: 芭提雅男女露宿店外惊扰顾客 城管部门介入处理
summary_cn: 3月13日，芭提雅市城市执法部门接到多名商业经营者投诉，称一对男女长期露宿在店铺门外。店主表示，这种情况制造了不适氛围，严重阻碍顾客进店，损害生意。执法人员随后赶赴现场，对这两名露宿者进行了谈话劝离和妥善安置。该事件反映了旅游区公共管理与流浪人口问题的矛盾，市府正加强街道巡逻维护环境。

title: 5-year-old boy’s ankle trapped in motorcycle wheel, rescuers rush to help near Pattaya
desc_original: Rescue workers assist a five-year-old boy after his ankle became trapped in the wheel of a Honda Wave motorcycle along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip, near Pattaya, before cutting the spokes to safely free his leg. PATTAYA, Thailand – Rescue workers rushed to assist a five-year-old boy whose ankle became trapped in the wheel of a motorcycle along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip.
title_cn: 芭提雅附近发生意外 5岁男童脚踝卡进摩托车轮
summary_cn: 在靠近芭提雅的梭桃邑（Sattahip）素坤逸路（Sukhumvit Road）段，发生一起幼童乘车事故。一名5岁小男孩在搭乘本田 Wave 摩托车时，脚踝不幸被卡入车轮辐条内。Sawang Rojanathammasathan 救援队的救援人员接到报警后迅速赶到，通过剪断车轮辐条才安全将其救出。此次事故再次引发了当地社会对儿童骑行安全教育及保护措施的关注。

title: 皮卡车为避让锥桶失控翻车撞电线杆，芭提雅（Pattaya）附近司机不幸身亡
desc_original: Rescue workers inspect a wrecked Toyota Hilux Vigo pickup truck after it overturned and crashed into a power pole along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip, near Pattaya, leaving the driver, Wittaya Kaokhem, dead at the scene. PATTAYA, Thailand – A man was killed after his pickup truck lost control and overturned before crashing into a roadside power pole along Sukhumvit Road in Sattahip, near Pattaya, on the evening of March 12. Police from Na Jomtien Police Station were alerted to the accident at about 7:40 p.m. and rushed to the scene along with rescue workers from the Sawang Rojanathammasathan. The
summary_cn: 3月12日晚，在芭提雅（Pattaya）附近的梭桃邑（Sattahip）素坤逸路（Sukhumvit）发生致命车祸。一名男子 Wittaya Kaokhem 驾驶海拉克斯皮卡车为避让路面交通锥桶，失控翻转并猛烈撞击路边电线杆。由于撞击猛烈，驾驶员当场身亡。纳考姆（Na Jomtien）警方及救援组织赶赴现场处理，事故导致该路段交通一度受阻。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）整治帕塔纳克山（Pratumnak Hill）公园流浪狗引发的蜱虫瘙痒问题
desc_original: Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, leads city veterinary and botanical teams spraying insecticide at a park on Pratumnak Hill to eliminate ticks and fleas linked to stray dogs and reduce the impact on residents exercising in the area. PATTAYA, Thailand – Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, led a team of veterinary officials and city botanical staff to tackle a tick and flea problem linked to stray dogs at a public park on Pratumnak Hill after complaints from residents and people exercising in the area. City officials carried out insecticide spraying around the park and captured severa
summary_cn: 针对居民反映帕塔纳克山（Pratumnak Hill）公园流浪狗导致的蜱虫和跳蚤滋生问题，芭提雅副市长 Manot Nongyai 带领兽医及园林团队对公园进行了大规模杀虫剂喷洒。此举旨在改善市民锻炼环境，减少寄生虫对人类及宠物的健康威胁。行动中还捕捉了部分带病流浪狗进行后续处理，确保公共区域卫生安全。

title: 燃油价格上涨威胁萨美桑（Samae San）渔民生计，芭提雅海鲜恐调价
desc_original: Prasert Pitakkorn, president of the Chong Samae San Fisheries Association, speaks about the impact of rising fuel prices on fishermen in Samae San, warning that escalating Middle East tensions could increase operating costs for fishing boats and eventually push seafood prices higher in nearby Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – Escalating military tensions in the Middle East involving the United States, Israel, and Iran are beginning to ripple through the global economy, particularly in the energy sector, with fishermen in Thailand already feeling the impact. The conflict has disrupted oil exports fr
summary_cn: 受中东地区紧张局势加剧影响，全球能源成本大幅波动。曼谷周边的萨美桑（Samae San）渔业协会警告，柴油价格上涨正显著提高出海捕捞成本。如果油价持续走高，芭提雅（Pattaya）市场的生鲜海产品价格将不可避免地随之上调。目前渔民面临运营困境，正密切关注能源市场动态以调整生计策略。

title: 强降雨导致梭桃邑（Sattahip）多处内涝，湿冷天气将持续至周末
desc_original: Heavy rain leaves sections of road flooded in Sattahip, Chonburi Province, slowing traffic and making travel difficult for motorists as wet weather continues across the area. PATTAYA, Thailand – Heavy rainfall lashed parts of Sattahip in Chonburi Province on Friday, causing water to accumulate in several areas and creating difficult travel conditions for motorists and residents. Downpours left standing water along a number of main roads and within local communities, forcing cars and motorcycles to slow down and leading to intermittent traffic congestion in parts of the district. Drivers were s
summary_cn: 受热带低压影响，春武里府梭桃邑（Sattahip）周五遭遇持续强降雨。多条主要路段及居民区出现严重积水，部分道路水深导致摩托车及小型车通行受阻。气象部门预报，此类降雨天气将持续至3月15日本周末，由于排水缓慢，当地交通可能持续拥堵，提醒过往司机谨慎驾驶并避开低洼路段。

title: 保险监管委员会在芭提雅（Pattaya）开展慈善活动，捐赠自行车及康复物资
desc_original: Damrongkiat Pinijkarn, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, receives CSR donations including pillows for bedridden patients and bicycles for underprivileged children from representatives of the Office of the Insurance Commission during a seminar at Holiday Inn Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – Damrongkiat Pinijkarn, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, together with Panrada Attohi, Deputy Permanent Secretary of the city, received donated items during a Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activity held as part of an onboarding seminar for new personnel from the Office of the Insurance Commission (OIC). The event took pla
summary_cn: 泰国保险委员会（OIC）在芭提雅假日酒店（Holiday Inn）举办研讨会期间，联合开展了企业社会责任（CSR）捐赠活动。芭提雅副市长 Damrongkiat 接受了捐赠的长期卧床病患专用枕头及贫困儿童自行车等物资。这些物资将通过市政系统发放给当地弱势群体，体现了公共部门与社会机构的协作帮扶精神。

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）东部铁路沿线道路翻新工程将于3月20日启动
desc_original: Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, chairs a meeting at City Hall to review progress on road improvement projects, including the eastern railway parallel road set to begin construction on March 20. PATTAYA, Thailand – Manot Nongyai, Deputy Mayor of Pattaya, chaired a meeting to monitor progress on several road improvement projects across the city, with a key focus on the long-awaited upgrade of the eastern railway parallel road. The meeting took place at Pattaya City Hall on March 13 and brought together officials from the city’s Engineering Department, Sanitation Engineering Division, rep
summary_cn: 芭提雅副市长 Manot Nongyai 于3月13日主持会议，确认东部铁路平行道路的升级工程将于3月20日正式动工。该项目是芭提雅多项道路改善计划的重点，旨在提升城市交通效率。相关部门包括工程部及卫生工程局共同参与进度审查。此工程将影响铁路沿线交通，提醒居民及常驻外籍人士关注潜在的交通绕行，该基建补强被视为改善旅游城市排水及路况的关键举措。

title: 治理芭提雅（Pattaya）绝非易事：市长谈旅游增长与居民需求的平衡
desc_original: Poramet Ngampichet, known locally as “Mayor Beer,” continues his work overseeing development and community issues in Pattaya, where supporters say leadership requires balancing tourism growth with the needs of local residents. PATTAYA, Thailand – As one of Thailand’s most dynamic tourist destinations, Pattaya requires a style of city management that goes beyond routine administrative procedures. Governing the city means navigating a complex landscape that includes the tourism economy, local entrepreneurs, long-established communities, and the constant pressures that come with rapid urban devel
summary_cn: 绰号“Beer市长”的芭提雅市长 Poramet Ngampichet 近期就城市治理发表看法。作为泰国的动态旅游枢纽，芭提雅的管理涉及错综复杂的利益，包括蓬勃的旅游经济、本地企业家利益、长期居住社区以及快速城市化带来的压力。市长支持者指出，其领导力体现在如何平衡旅游业扩张与改善当地居民生活质量。报道反映了该市在转型为世界级旅游目的地过程中所面临的行政和社会治理挑战。

title: 伊朗使馆就“泰籍海员遭袭”发不当笑话引发泰国网民强烈抗议
desc_original: The Iranian embassy in South Africa has removed a social‑media post about Thai seafarers rescued after their ship was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz, saying it was meant as humour and not to offend Thai people, following angry backlash in Thailand.
summary_cn: 伊朗驻南非大使馆撤回了一篇涉及泰籍海员的社交媒体帖文。此前一艘载有泰籍员工的船只在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）附近遭袭，使馆发布的调侃内容引发了泰国社会的强烈不满。伊朗方面解释称该帖文旨在幽默而非冒犯，但在遭遇大面积舆论控诉后已将其删除。此次事件凸显了中东局势敏感背景下，外籍劳工安全问题在泰国国内的高度敏感性。

title: 曼谷 MBK 购物中心遭扫黄打非，查获 3000 万铢假货
desc_original: More than 100,000 counterfeit goods worth about 30 million baht have been seized during a raid at MBK Center in Bangkok as authorities step up action against intellectual property violations.
summary_cn: 泰国当局近期加大了对知识产权侵权行为的打击力度，突击搜查了曼谷著名的 MBK 购物中心。此次行动共查获超过10万件假冒伪劣商品，总价值估计达3000万泰铢。 MBK 一直以来以销售价格低廉的仿制品闻名，此次大规模执法行动释放了政府整顿商业环境、打击非法贸易的信号。提醒游客在购买名牌商品时警惕低价陷阱，规避此类打击行动带来的潜在纠纷。

title: 泰选委会小组撤销对 229 名参议员选举舞弊嫌疑人的指控
desc_original: Disappointment and criticism are mounting after reports that an Election Commission (EC) subcommittee has voted to clear all 229 suspects in the high-profile Senate election collusion case, prompting calls for the commission to disclose its reasoning.
summary_cn: 泰国选举委员会（EC）一个小组投票决定撤销对229名参议员选举串通案嫌疑人的指控，此举引发社会各界的广泛失望与强烈批评。该案件涉及此前参议院选举期间的高度关注的舞弊举报。公众和监督机构目前正敦促选委会公开其判决理由。这一裁决对泰国政治透明度和选举公平性产生了重大冲击，可能引发后续法律申诉或社会抗议。

title: 曼谷公交车多次拒绝载客，残障人士轮椅拦路抗议引发关注
desc_original: Bangkok public buses criticised for refusing to serve disabled passenger Legacy Thai Smile Bus faced online criticism after a viral video showed its buses repeatedly ignored a disabled man on a wheelchair until the man had to block the road yesterday, March 12. The Mirror Foundation posted the clip on its official Facebook page, showing a disabled man in a wheelchair struggling to get a bus stop. In its caption, the foundation said… “Bus after bus drove past. Public transport , which advertises itself as being designed for everyone, did not stop to pick him up. Forcing him to decide to m
summary_cn: 3月12日，一段曼谷残障人士在轮椅上拦路阻挡公交车的视频在社交媒体疯传，引发了对泰微笑巴士（Thai Smile Bus）的强烈批评。据悉，该男子在公交站多次尝试搭乘均被无视，最终被迫采取极端方式。泰國镜子基金会（Mirror Foundation）公开此视频并抨击虽然公共交通标榜“为民设计”，却拒绝履行基本服务，反映了曼谷无障碍交通系统的失效。
title_cn: 曼谷公交车因拒绝载客残障人士遭抨击 (Bangkok Public Bus)

title: 曼谷老宅凌晨突发火灾，外籍男子英勇救人深受嘉许
desc_original: Foreign man praised for helping residents evacuate during fire Legacy A foreign man helped Thai residents escape a Bangkok house fire by waking people up, urging them to evacuate and assisting a disabled resident out of a building. The fire broke out on the second floor of a two-storey commercial building in Soi Samsen 3, Ban Pan Thom, Phra Nakhon district, at about 4.55am on Wednesday, March 11. The buildings were part of a row of interconnected units, causing the fire to spread to nearby properties quickly. Firefighters brought the blaze under control in about 30 minutes. Four to five buildi
summary_cn: 3月11日凌晨约4点55分，曼谷拍那空区（Phra Nakhon）三森3巷（Soi Samsen 3）的一座两层商业建筑发生火警。一名勇敢的外籍男子发现火情后，逐户叫醒居民并协助包括一名残障人士在内的民众紧急疏散。大火波及了数栋相连的排屋，消防员耗时30分钟控制。该外籍人士的行为因防止了潜在的人员伤亡而受到当地居民和网民的高度赞誉。
title_cn: 外籍英雄在曼谷三森路（Samsen Road）火灾中协助居民疏散

title: 普吉岛逮捕一名法国籍国际刑警红通嫌犯
desc_original: French Interpol Red Notice suspect detained in Phuket Legacy A French national was detained in Phuket yesterday, March 12, as immigration police acted on a French Embassy request involving a suspect wanted in France and subject to an Interpol Red Notice . The request was sent through the Royal Thai Police Foreign Affairs Division and sought cooperation to arrest the man, revoke his permission to stay in Thailand and deport him back to France . Investigators believed he may have been living in Phuket and began enquiries to trace his whereabouts. Police later identified a house in Rawai subdistr
summary_cn: 3月12日，普吉岛移民局警方在拉威区（Rawai）成功抓获一名被国际刑警组织（Interpol）通缉的法国籍“红通”嫌犯。此次抓捕是应法国大使馆通过泰国皇家警察外交事务部门发出的正式请求所执行的。该男子目前已被撤销在泰停留许可，并将根据法定程序遣返回法国受审，涉嫌案件详情尚未完全披露。
title_cn: 法国籍红通嫌犯在普吉岛拉威（Rawai）落网

title: 2026年改善空气质量（BAQ）国际会议在曼谷举行
desc_original: BANGKOK — Better Air Quality (BAQ) Conference 2026, bringing together policymakers, scientists and environmental experts from across Asia and beyond to address the region’s growing air pollution challenges. The conference served as a key platform for governments, research institutions and international organisations to share strategies aimed at improving air quality and protecting public health. The event focused on practical solutions for reducing emissions, strengthening environmental policy and advancing clean technologies. Participants included representatives from national and local gover
summary_cn: 2026年改善空气质量（Better Air Quality, BAQ）会议在曼谷正式拉开帷幕，汇集了来自亚洲及全球的决策者、科学家和环境专家。本次大会旨在应对亚洲日益严峻的PM2.5及空气污染挑战，重点探讨减少碳排放的实用方案、强化环境政策以及推广清洁能源技术。会议为多国政府和科研机构提供了一个分享治理经验和保护公众健康策略的关键平台。
title_cn: 2026年改善空气质量会议（BAQ）在曼谷探讨污染治理方案

title: 芭提雅警方抓获一名向青少年兜售笑气的中国籍男子
desc_original: Chinese man arrested for selling laughing gas in Pattaya Legacy Police arrested a Chinese man during a sting operation in Pattaya yesterday, March 12, for selling laughing gas to teenagers through online advertisements. Officers from Immigration Bureau Division 3 said they received a tip-off that a Chinese national was promoting the sale of nitrous oxide, commonly known as laughing gas, online, with teenagers in Pattaya listed as the target customers. Police said the adverts were widely shared online and appeared to show disregard for Thai law. Immigration police said they investigated and ide
summary_cn: 3月12日，芭提雅移民局警方通过钓鱼执法成功逮捕一名中国籍男子。该男子通过网络平台公开发布广告，向芭提雅地区的青少年兜售一氧化二氮（俗称“笑气”）。警方此前收到举报，称该男子的非法活动公然无视泰国法律并在社交网络广泛传播。目前，该嫌疑人已因违反药事健康相关法案被扣押，将面临泰国司法起诉及随后的驱逐出境处理。
title_cn: 中国籍男子因在芭提雅（Pattaya）向青少年贩卖笑气被捕

title: 在泰国当老师全攻略：入职流程、薪资水平及所需材料必备清单
desc: Teaching jobs in Thailand – How to move, what you’ll earn, and documents needed Legacy Looking for teaching jobs in Thailand? The process is more straightforward than it looks from the outside, but it does require getting a few things right up front. The legal side matters as you need the correct visa and work permit before you start teaching. The key is understanding what to expect at each stage and budgeting properly for the first few months. Here’s what you actually need to know about visas, finding jobs, what you’ll earn, and how to cover yourself for healthcare wit
desc_original: Teaching jobs in Thailand – How to move, what you’ll earn, and documents needed Legacy Looking for teaching jobs in Thailand? The process is more straightforward than it looks from the outside, but it does require getting a few things right up front. The legal side matters as you need the correct visa and work permit before you start teaching. The key is understanding what to expect at each stage and budgeting properly for the first few months. Here’s what you actually need to know about visas, finding jobs, what you’ll earn, and how to cover yourself for healthcare wit
summary_cn: 本文为有意在泰国从教的外籍人员更新了最新指南。内容涵盖了从法律合规到实际生活的核心细节，强调在开教前必须获得正确的非移民B类签证（Non-B Visa）和工作许可。文中还详细分析了不同类型学校的薪资水平、求职渠道以及前几个月生活的预算规划。此外，还特别提醒了医疗保险的重要性，帮助外籍教师在泰国职业生涯初期的平稳过渡。

title: 泰国海军证实：泰籍货船遇袭后 3 名失联船员确认幸存但暂无法接回
desc: Navy confirms three Thai cargo ship crew alive but still unreachable Legacy The Royal Thai Navy confirmed today, March 13, that three Thai crew members from the cargo ship Mayuree Naree are still alive but cannot yet be reached after the vessel was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Speaking at the Royal Thai Navy Headquarters, Admiral Thadawut Tatpitakkul, Chief of Staff of the Royal Thai Navy, gave an update on the Mayuree Naree crew situation. He said the vessel had a total of 23 crew, and 20 have now been brought to a safe zone. The remaining three crew members , identified as engineers,
desc_original: Navy confirms three Thai cargo ship crew alive but still unreachable Legacy The Royal Thai Navy confirmed today, March 13, that three Thai crew members from the cargo ship Mayuree Naree are still alive but cannot yet be reached after the vessel was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Speaking at the Royal Thai Navy Headquarters, Admiral Thadawut Tatpitakkul, Chief of Staff of the Royal Thai Navy, gave an update on the Mayuree Naree crew situation. He said the vessel had a total of 23 crew, and 20 have now been brought to a safe zone. The remaining three crew members , identified as engineers,
summary_cn: 泰国皇家海军（Royal Thai Navy）于3月13日证实，在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）附近遇袭的货船“Mayuree Naree”号中，3名泰籍工程师确认幸存，但目前仍处于失联无法接触的状态。该船共有23名船员，其中20人已安全转移。海军参谋长Thadawut Tatpitakkul海军上将表示，目前正在全力沟通，争取尽快将剩余人员转移至安全地带。

title: 曼谷素坤逸路（Sukhumvit）爆发抗议：穆斯林团体集会抗议以色列对伊战争
desc: BANGKOK — A group of Muslim protesters gathered outside the Embassy of Israel in Bangkok on Sukhumvit Road on Friday afternoon to protest against Israel over the war involving Iran . The rally began at about 14:00 on 13 March, with men, women and children, mostly Muslims, taking part. Demonstrators waved the flags of Palestine and Iran while chanting slogans condemning Israel and the United States . Some participants held pictures of Ali Khamenei as well as images depicting casualties from the conflict. Speakers at the rally criticised Israel and the United States, accusing them of supporting
desc_original: BANGKOK — A group of Muslim protesters gathered outside the Embassy of Israel in Bangkok on Sukhumvit Road on Friday afternoon to protest against Israel over the war involving Iran . The rally began at about 14:00 on 13 March, with men, women and children, mostly Muslims, taking part. Demonstrators waved the flags of Palestine and Iran while chanting slogans condemning Israel and the United States . Some participants held pictures of Ali Khamenei as well as images depicting casualties from the conflict. Speakers at the rally criticised Israel and the United States, accusing them of supporting
summary_cn: 3月13日下午2点左右，一群穆斯林示威者在曼谷素坤逸路（Sukhumvit）的以色列驻泰国大使馆前举行集会。集会者挥舞巴勒斯坦和伊朗国旗，高喊谴责以色列和美国的口号，抗议近期涉及伊朗的武装冲突。抗议人群包括男女老幼，现场有人展示冲突伤亡照片及伊朗领导人哈梅内伊的画像。此举反映了国际中东局势对泰国社会舆论的影响，周边交通受一定干扰。

title: 突发！呵叻府（Korat）M6 高速公路惊现裸男拦截车辆
desc: NAKHON RATCHASIMA — 13 March 2026, A naked man was found sitting on the M6 motorway in Nakhon Ratchasima province on Friday morning, prompting highway police and rescue workers to intervene and move him to a safe area. Highway police officers on routine patrol along the Bang Pa-in–Nakhon Ratchasima motorway received reports from motorists that a man was sitting on the road surface while naked between kilometre markers 179 and 180, in the Kham Thale So–Nakhon Ratchasima bypass section near the exit to Mueang Nakhon Ratchasima district. The sight alarmed drivers passing the area, who feared the
desc_original: NAKHON RATCHASIMA — 13 March 2026, A naked man was found sitting on the M6 motorway in Nakhon Ratchasima province on Friday morning, prompting highway police and rescue workers to intervene and move him to a safe area. Highway police officers on routine patrol along the Bang Pa-in–Nakhon Ratchasima motorway received reports from motorists that a man was sitting on the road surface while naked between kilometre markers 179 and 180, in the Kham Thale So–Nakhon Ratchasima bypass section near the exit to Mueang Nakhon Ratchasima district. The sight alarmed drivers passing the area, who feared the
summary_cn: 3月13日上午，在呵叻府（Nakhon Ratchasima）的M6高速公路（Bang Pa-in至呵叻段）上，一名全身赤裸的男子被发现坐在179-180公里处的路面上，位置靠近 Kham Thale So 绕道出口。过往司机受惊后随即报警，高速公路警察及救援组织迅速赶往现场将该男子带离危险区域至安全地带。由于该行为对高速行驶的车辆构成重大安全隐患，警方正对其动机进行调查。

title: 北榄府（Samut Prakan）发生比特犬伤人案：70岁老妇在家门口遭重创
desc: Pit bull attacks 70 year old Thai woman in Samut Prakan Legacy A pit bull attack in Samut Prakan left a 70 year old woman injured on Wednesday, March 11. The dog had previously attacked two other people in the community. Samut Prakan Rescue Foundation said it was alerted to the incident in Soi Ruam Pattaya 8 at about 6pm. Rescuers found the injured woman, 70 year old Fu Lorrattanamongkhon, sitting on a chair outside her home. The four year old pit bull, named Four, was locked inside the house after the attack. Fu had blood on her face and head, with a serious wound near her right eye and sever
desc_original: Pit bull attacks 70 year old Thai woman in Samut Prakan Legacy A pit bull attack in Samut Prakan left a 70 year old woman injured on Wednesday, March 11. The dog had previously attacked two other people in the community. Samut Prakan Rescue Foundation said it was alerted to the incident in Soi Ruam Pattaya 8 at about 6pm. Rescuers found the injured woman, 70 year old Fu Lorrattanamongkhon, sitting on a chair outside her home. The four year old pit bull, named Four, was locked inside the house after the attack. Fu had blood on her face and head, with a serious wound near her right eye and sever
summary_cn: 3月11日，北榄府（Samut Prakan）Ruam Pattaya 8巷发生惨剧，一名70岁老妇在家门口遭到邻居家4岁大的比特犬“Four”袭击。伤者面部及头部受重创，右眼伤势严重并伴有多处撕裂。据当地救援基金会透露，该犬此前已在社区内有过两次伤人记录。事件引发了当地社区对于烈性犬控制管理不严的极度担忧与抗议，目前伤者仍在接受救治。

title: 2026年印度尼西亚旅游交易会（ITX 2026）将汇聚行业领袖共话旅游业未来
desc_original: Indonesia Tourism Xchange 2026 to unite industry leaders for a forward-looking dialogue on the future of travel Legacy Indonesia’s tourism and hospitality sector will gain a new national industry platform with the launch of Indonesia Tourism Xchange 2026 (ITX 2026) , a focused forum bringing together hotel owners, operators, investors, and senior decision-makers from across the archipelago to examine the forces shaping the country’s tourism economy at a time of renewed growth and increasing complexity. Taking place on May 12 at The Langham , Jakarta , ITX 2026 has been curated to reflect Indon
summary_cn: 2026年印度尼西亚旅游交易会（Indonesia Tourism Xchange 2026，简称ITX 2026）将于5月12日在雅加达 Jakarta 的朗廷酒店举行。该论坛旨在为印尼旅游和酒店业打造全新的国家级平台，汇集酒店业主、运营商及资深决策者，共同研讨在旅游经济复苏背景下的行业变革力。作为东盟旅游业的重要风向标，此活动将分析其日益增长且复杂的旅游经济格局，推动印尼乃至周边区域的旅游市场持续发展。

title: 名士“坤将” Gun Jompalang 提议泰海军使用摩托艇搜救霍尔姆斯海峡失踪船员
desc_original: Jet skis, inflatable boats proposed for Thai cargo ship crew search Legacy Thai public figure Gun Jompalang has proposed using small vessels as an option for the Royal Thai Navy as efforts continue to locate three Thai crew members missing after the cargo ship Mayuree Naree was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Gun Jompalang said today, March 13, that he had taken the family of one of the missing crew members to provide the latest updates to relevant authorities. If the missing crew are still not found tonight, the family will reportedly pass any additional details they have to the Royal Tha
summary_cn: 泰国知名社会人士 Gun Jompalang 针对在霍尔姆斯海峡 Strait of Hormuz 遇袭后失踪的三名“Mayuree Naree”号货船泰籍船员，向泰国皇家海军提议调动水上摩托艇和充气船等小型灵活船只协助搜救。3月13日，Gun 陪同失踪船员家属与有关部门会面，并呼吁加强搜寻力度。目前救援行动仍在继续，家属已准备好向军方提供更详细的个人背景资料以便排查。此事件折射出泰国劳工跨海作业面临的地缘安全风险。

title: 芭提雅 Pattaya 华裔女性失踪案告破：遗体于叻武里府 Ratchaburi 种植园被发现
desc_original: Chinese woman missing in Pattaya found dead in Ratchaburi plantation Legacy A Chinese woman who went missing after working as a party entertainer at a pool villa in Pattaya was later found dead in a coconut plantation in Ratchaburi province. The 31 year old Chinese man, Zhang Xiaotian, travelled to Thailand to search for his missing girlfriend, 34 year old Ji Cherngchao. Zhang revealed that they had been in a relationship for over four years. While Zhang was based in China, Ji worked in Pattaya. Zhang reported her missing to Nong Prue Police Station officers on February 23. He said Ji’s
summary_cn: 一名在芭提雅泳池别墅工作的34岁华裔女性 Ji Cherngchao 确认遇害，其遗体在叻武里府 Ratchaburi 一处椰子种植园被发现。受害人生前在芭提雅从事演艺招待工作。其31岁的中国籍男朋友 Zhang Xiaotian 此前专程从中国来泰，于2月23日向农普 Nong Prue 警察局报案寻人。此案引起在泰华人群体高度关注，警方正针对被害原因和凶手展开深入调查，提醒在泰从事夜场或娱乐行业的人员务必注意个人安全。

title: 泰国羽毛球名将昆拉武特 Kunlavut Vitidsarn 时隔九月重返世界第一
desc_original: BANGKOK — Kunlavut Vitidsarn has reclaimed the world No. 1 spot in men’s singles in the latest rankings released by the Badminton World Federation on 10 March. The Thai badminton star, widely known as “View,” returned to the top of the world rankings after nine months. His rise followed a strong performance at the All England Open Badminton Championships 2026 in Birmingham, one of the oldest and most prestigious tournaments on the World Tour Super 1000 circuit. Kunlavut advanced to the semi-finals of the tournament, marking his best-ever result at the event. In the previous four editions, he h
summary_cn: 在世界羽联（BWF）3月10日公布的最新一期世界排名中，泰国羽毛球明星“View”昆拉武特 Kunlavut Vitidsarn 时隔九个月再次登顶男单世界第一。他在2026年全英羽毛球公开赛中表现极其出色并闯入半决赛，刷新了个人在该赛事的最佳战绩。作为泰国体育界的标志性人物，昆拉武特的重返巅峰极大地提振了泰国国民士气，也预示着泰国在羽毛球国际赛事中持续保持竞争优势。

title: 泰国活动家坤将对霍尔姆斯海峡失踪水手救援提出“水上摩托艇”方案
desc_original: BANGKOK — Kanthat Pongpaiboonvej, widely known as Kan Jompalang, has proposed sending a jet ski team to help search for three missing Thai crew members after a Thai cargo vessel was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. The vessel Mayuree Naree was reportedly attacked near the strait, leaving three Thai crew members still missing. Kan Jompalang is a well-known Thai activist who has taken part in several rescue and relief efforts during disasters and emergencies. Kan Jompalang met the family of one of the missing sailors on Thursday to update them on the situation and discuss possible ways to ass
summary_cn: 泰国著名活动家、以参与各类突发紧急救援著称的 Kan Jompalang（俗称“坤将”）正式提议，应当组建专业的摩托艇救援队，前往霍尔姆斯海峡协助寻找因货船遇袭而失踪的三名泰籍船员。该艘名为“Mayuree Naree”的货船疑似在重要航道附近遭遇袭击。他在周四与家属会谈时表达了民间专业搜救力量介入的可能性，此举引发了公众对货运航线安全及民间力量如何协同军事力量参与跨国救援的深入讨论。

title: 曼谷曼谷警方高度戒备，严防今日支持巴勒斯坦游行
title_cn: 曼谷曼谷警方高度戒备，严防今日支持巴勒斯坦游行
summary_cn: 曼谷大都会警察局正对今日（3月13日）下午约2点举行的“国际耶路撒冷日”（International Quds Day）集会保持高度警惕。警方已加强对驻泰外交机构及敏感区域的安保监控措施。曼谷大都会警局副局长塞亚姆（Pol. Lt. Gen. Sayam Boonsom）表示，鉴于中东冲突局势升温，安全部门已多次开会评估风险并调整应对方案，以确保曼谷公共秩序不受干扰。
desc_original: Pro-Palestinian protest planned in Bangkok today, police on high alert Legacy Bangkok police are preparing for the International Quds Day gathering at about 2pm today, March 13, increasing security planning and surveillance measures around diplomatic premises and other sensitive venues, amid the heightened Middle East tensions. The Metropolitan Police Bureau has been reviewing the situation with other security agencies and adjusting its readiness accordingly. Pol. Lt. Gen. Sayam Boonsom, the bureau chief, said that earlier this week, police held meetings to evaluate risks and set out operation

title: Thailand’s Tourism Set for Growth as Tomorrowland 2026 Brings World-Class EDM Festival to Pattaya, Attracting Visitors from Across the Globe - Travel And Tour World
title_cn: Tomorrowland 2026落户芭提雅（Pattaya），世界级电音节助推泰国旅游增长
summary_cn: 世界知名电音盛事 Tomorrowland 确认将于2026年在泰国芭提雅（Pattaya）举办为期三天的音乐节。这一国际级盛会预计将吸引来自全球各地的电音爱好者，届时将有世界顶级DJ加盟。泰国政府及旅游界期望通过举办此类世界级盛典，进一步巩固泰国作为国际演艺与节庆中心的地位，刺激当地旅游消费及经济增长。
desc_original: Tomorrowland Thailand 2026 promises an unforgettable three-day festival in Pattaya, where world-class DJs and dazzling stages await EDM fans.

title: Bangkok launches ‘Galaxy of Love 2026’ festival blending art, music and immersive technology - Pattaya Mail
title_cn: “惊艳泰国：2026爱之银河”庆典在曼谷 One Bangkok 盛大开幕
summary_cn: 泰国国家旅游局（TAT）副局长纳特（Nat Kruthasoot）在曼谷大型综合体项目 One Bangkok Park 主持了“惊艳泰国：2026爱之银河”（Galaxy of Love 2026）嘉年华的启动仪式。活动融合了艺术、音乐与浸入式科技，设有多个沉浸式科技球形穹顶及音乐表演。此次活动展示了曼谷利用数字艺术推动软实力及旅游业多元化发展的尝试。
desc_original: ... Nat Kruthasoot, Deputy Governor for Tourism Products and Business at the Tourism Authority of Thailand, opens the “Amazing Thailand Galaxy of Love 2026” festival at One Bangkok Park in Bangkok, showcasing immersive domes, music performances, ...

title: Songkran Festival 2026: Thailand Water Festival Dates, Traditions & Travel Guide
title_cn: 2026年宋干节（Songkran）指南：法定假期三天，清迈与芭提雅庆祝期延长
summary_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节法定公众假期为4月13日至15日，但泰国各主要城市的庆祝活动通常会提前或延长。清迈（Chiang Mai）和芭提雅（Pattaya）已明确将举行长达数日的狂欢，包括传统的游行、演唱会和文化活动。作为泰国年度最重要的水上狂欢，该庆典预计将迎来2026年旅游流量的最大峰值。
desc_original: The official holiday lasts three days (April 13–15), but celebrations in many cities—especially Chiang Mai and Pattaya—can extend for several additional days with parades, concerts, and cultural events.

source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel
title: 2026 in Thailand - Wikipedia
title_cn: 泰国2026年大事记：宪法公投、佛历2569年及其它重大政治安排
summary_cn: 2026年在泰国历法中被记为佛历2569年。根据泰王国政府公报，泰国定于2月8日就新宪法草案举行全民公投，这是本年度最重要的政治节点之一。本年度其他关键议题还包括政治改革的推进及各界对民生政策的关注。该年份将决定未来几年泰国政治结构的稳定性与治理方向。
desc_original: Following is a list of events and scheduled events in the year 2026 in Thailand. The year 2026 is reckoned as the year 2569 in Buddhist Era, the Thai calendar. ... 2 January – The Royal Gazette officially places the date for a referendum on a new constitution for February 8. 6 January – ...

title_cn: 2026年宋干节（Songkran）指南：泰国最盛大泼水狂欢攻略
desc_original: Thailand is preparing for nationwide celebrations for Songkran 2026, which will take place from April 13–15, with major events organised across the country as well as extended “Wan Lai” festivals in Chon Buri province.
summary_cn: 随着2026年宋干节（Songkran）临近，泰国正筹备全国性的庆祝活动。节日定于4月13日至15日举行，届时全国范围内将有大型传统活动与泼水派对。值得注意的是，春武里府（Chon Buri）还将举行延长版的“万莱节”（Wan Lai）狂欢，提供更长周期的庆祝体验。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）举办2026印泰融合之庆：洒红节与宋干节嘉年华
desc_original: Experience the vibrant fusion of Indian and Thai cultures at the Holi-Songkran Fiesta 2026 in Bangkok!Held on March 8, 2026 at ITCC Bangkok, this colorful ce...
summary_cn: 2026年3月8日，曼谷印泰商会（ITCC Bangkok）举办了一场别具一格的印泰文化融合盛会——洒红节-宋干节嘉年华（Holi-Songkran Fiesta 2026）。活动展示了印度传统洒红节与泰国泼水节的美妙结合，促进了多元文化交流，吸引了大量市民参与。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 2026年宋干节攻略：泰国泼水节日期、传统与旅游全指南
desc_original: In 2026, Songkran will take place from April 13 to April 15, bringing vibrant cultural traditions, religious rituals, and massive street celebrations across Thailand. Whether you’re planning to explore bustling cities like Bangkok or cultural ...
summary_cn: 2026年宋干节泼水活动将于4月13日至15日在全泰拉开帷幕。这一泰国最具代表性的节日不仅包含激烈的街头泼水大战，还承载着深厚的宗教仪式与家庭团聚传统。无论是在曼谷（Bangkok）等繁华都市，还是各文化历史名城，游客均可体验独特民俗，是近期来泰不容错过的时刻。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）ITCC 中心举办印泰文化节：欢庆洒红节与宋干节
desc_original: Held on March 8, 2026, at the ITCC in Bangkok, the event ran from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM, filling the venue with music, dance, traditional rituals, and the playful spirit of both Holi and Songkran.
summary_cn: 2026年3月8日，曼谷印度泰裔商会（ITCC）成功举办了印泰联合庆祝活动。从上午10点至下午5点，现场充满了音乐、舞蹈、传统祭祀仪式及洒红节与宋干节特有的泼水/涂彩狂欢。该活动不仅体现了曼谷作为国际大都市的文化包容力，也成功吸引了印裔社区与当地居民的共同参与。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）文化艺术版图更新：新增 Dib Bangkok 艺术中心
desc_original: The centrally located Bangkok Art and Culture Centre, opened in 2008 following a fifteen-year lobbying campaign, is now the largest public exhibition space in the city. There are also many other art galleries and museums, including the privately owned Museum of Contemporary Art and the newly opened Dib Bangkok.
summary_cn: 位于曼谷（Bangkok）市中心的曼谷艺术文化中心（BACC）目前仍是泰国的顶级艺术殿堂。与此同时，曼谷的艺术氛围持续多元化，除了著名的当代艺术博物馆（MOCA）外，最新开幕的 Dib Bangkok 也迅速成为艺术爱好者的新地标，丰富了当地居民与游客的文化生活体验。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: Tomorrowland 2026 世界级电音节定档芭提雅（Pattaya），助力泰国旅游业增长
desc_original: When to go The festival will run from December 11 to 13, 2026, offering three full days of music, art, and culture. Visitors can expect an array of performances from some of the most celebrated DJs, live shows, and an overall electrifying atmosphere.
summary_cn: 世界顶级电音节 Tomorrowland 官方宣布将于2026年12月11日至13日在芭提雅（Pattaya）举办。为期三天的活动将融合音乐、艺术与文化，届时全球知名 DJ 与表演艺术家将齐聚泰国。此次盛会预计将吸引数万名国际游客，成为泰国2026年旅游业增长的核心引擎，进一步巩固其全球娱乐目的地地位。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: 2026年泰国大事预测：2月8日将举行新宪法全民公投
desc_original: Following is a list of events and scheduled events in the year 2026 in Thailand. The year 2026 is reckoned as the year 2569 in Buddhist Era, the Thai calendar. ... 2 January – The Royal Gazette officially places the date for a referendum on a new constitution for February 8. 6 January – ...
summary_cn: 泰国政府已通过《皇家公报》（Royal Gazette）官宣，计划于2026年2月8日就新宪法草案举行全民公投。2026年即泰国佛历2569年，该公投被视为泰国政坛年度最重磅事件，将对未来国家政治格局产生深远影响。当前各项准备工作及相关法律程序正在推进中，涉及选举规则与国家治理体系的调整。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: 2026年曼谷（Bangkok）艺术浪潮更迭：传统与现代公共空间的交融
desc_original: Bangkok’s art scene in 2026 doesn’t just feel bigger, it feels more usable. New spaces are acting less like quiet showrooms and more like public rooms for the city. That shift is shaping a fresh kind of “Thai-ness,” one that can hold ...
summary_cn: 2026年，曼谷（Bangkok）的艺术版图正在发生质变。新兴艺术空间不再仅是静止的展厅，而逐渐转型为融入城市生活的“公共客厅”。这一转变不仅扩大了艺术规模，更在重新定义现代“泰式风格”，使艺术成为市民社交与文化互动的核心载体。这种艺术空间的易得性正潜移默化地影响泰国传统文化的现代表达。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: 2026年泰国必打卡文化节指南：深度体验泰式传统魅力
desc_original: Experience spectacular cultural festivals in Thailand in 2026 that highlight the nation’s rich traditions, colours, and lively celebrations.
summary_cn: 2026年泰国将迎来一系列精彩纷呈的传统节庆。作为东南亚文化大国，泰国的各类庆典以其丰富的色彩、深厚的人文底蕴和热烈的庆祝形式著称。无论是泼水节还是水灯节，这些节日不仅是旅游热点，更是游客深入了解泰国民俗、感触原汁原味泰式生活方式的最佳窗口，建议旅行者提前规划行程。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: 2026芭提雅（Pattaya）深度游攻略：从真理寺到东芭乐园的完整路线
desc_original: Day 3: Nong Nooch Tropical Botanical Garden: Spend the day exploring the gardens and cultural shows. Day 4: Sanctuary of Truth: Visit the stunning wooden temple and learn about traditional Thai craftsmanship. Day 5: Coral Island (Koh Larn): Take a day trip to Coral Island for snorkeling and beach relaxation. Day 6: Pattaya Floating Market: Experience local foods and crafts at the floating market. Day 7: Art in Paradise: Have fun with interactive 3D art exhibits.
summary_cn: 2026最新芭提雅（Pattaya）七日游路线出炉。攻略重点推荐了东芭乐园（Nong Nooch Garden）的植物景观、真理寺（Sanctuary of Truth）的精湛木雕工艺、格兰岛（Koh Larn）的水上运动以及水上市场（Floating Market）的特色美食。此外，互动艺术馆 Art in Paradise 也是亲子出游的热点，为游客提供了详尽的芭提雅全方位游玩指南。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 2026年泰国大事记：宪法公投定于2月举行
summary_cn: 2026年（佛历2569年）泰国迎来多项政治议程。据《皇家公报》披露，泰国政府已正式确定于2月8日举行新宪法草案的全民公投。这一举动标志着泰国政治改革进入关键阶段，将直接影响未来国家的法治框架和行政走向。该年度记事还涵盖了自1月初启动的各项国家级议程，对长期关注泰国政策走向的投资者和外籍人士具有高度参考价值。
desc_original: Following is a list of events and scheduled events in the year 2026 in Thailand. The year 2026 is reckoned as the year 2569 in Buddhist Era, the Thai calendar. ... 2 January – The Royal Gazette officially places the date for a referendum on a new constitution for February 8. 6 January – ...
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 泰国商务部举办DITP出口博览会 (DITP EXPO 2026) 助力全球贸易
summary_cn: 泰国商务部国际贸易促进厅（DITP）于2026年3月11日至13日在商务部总部举办博览会。此次博览会汇集了135家极具出口潜力的泰国企业，展示涵盖多种品类的优质产品。活动旨在提升泰国产品在国际市场的竞争力，促进跨境贸易合作。对于寻找泰国优质分销商和货源的中外企业而言，这是掌握泰国贸易出口动态的重要窗口。
desc_original: The expo will be held from March 11-13, 2026, at the Ministry of Commerce and will feature 135 companies with export-potential products.
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 曼谷古着跳蚤市场潮：复古消费催生新型零售节日
summary_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）的古着文化正迎来蓬勃发展，跳蚤市场已不再是传统的杂货摊。新兴策划者将复古兴趣转化为大规模零售节日，活动遍及仓库、天台和停车场等创意空间。这种带门票性质的集市吸引了约1.5万名参与者，现场伴有DJ表演和酒水，不仅代表了泰国年轻一代的消费取向，也反映出曼谷复古产业从地摊向生活方式品牌转型的经济趋势。
desc_original: “Everything I buy I want to pick with care.” Appropriately enough, his love of vintage was handed down to him by his father and he has turned the often dusty shopping format into a retail festival held at warehouses, rooftops and car parks across the Thai capital. Roughly 15,000 people attend his ticketed fairs, which run into the evening with DJ sets and plenty of drinks.
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 亚洲最大和风盛事：2026年日本博览会 (JAPAN EXPO THAILAND) 曼谷开幕
summary_cn: 2026年日本博览会泰国的规模再创新高，于2月6日至8日在曼谷尚泰购物中心（centralwOrld）隆重举行。作为亚洲最大的全日本主题活动，本次盛会邀请了日本偶像组合 FES⭐TIVE 等艺人进行现场演出。活动涵盖了日本文化、旅游、美食及商务交流，吸引了大量当地民众和游客参与，展现了日泰两国深厚的文化纽带及曼谷作为国际展会中心的地位。
desc_original: JAPAN EXPO THAILAND 2026THE BIGGEST ALL JAPAN EVENT IN ASIA‼️📅 Friday 6 – Sunday 8 February 2026 (10:00 am - 9:00 pm)📍 centralwOrld, Bangkok🏢 Organized by...
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 2026年泰国移动通讯博览会 (Thailand Mobile Expo) 于诗丽吉中心开幕
summary_cn: 2026年泰国移动通讯博览会（Thailand Mobile Expo）于3月12日在诗丽吉王后国家会议中心（QSNCC）拉开帷幕。此次博览会汇集了各大手机品牌及科技创新企业，展示最新的移动通讯技术和消费电子产品。博览会不仅是消费者选购折扣电子设备的热门去处，也是洞察泰国数字化进程与科技市场潜力的风向标。同期，著名脱口秀演员 Louis CK 的曼谷表演也备受关注。
desc_original: Louis CK in Bangkok is happening ... Siam Pic-Ganesha), Bangkok · Thailand Mobile Expo 2026 is happening on Thu 12 Mar 2026 from 12:00 PM onwards at ศูนย์การประชุมแห่งชาติสิร...
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 2026年泰国文化节指南：从宋干节（Songkran）到水灯节（Loy Krathong）
summary_cn: 2026年泰国将迎来多项重要的传统文化庆典。从标志着传统新年的宋干节（Songkran）到充满浪漫色彩的水灯节（Loy Krathong），这些节日不仅是游客眼中的绝佳拍摄点，更是泰国社会标记季节更替、祈求功德和传承非物质文化遗产的核心方式。活动将覆盖曼谷以及清迈、素可泰等全国各主要城市，展现东南亚独特的民俗魅力。游客应提前规划行程，以体验泰式传统宗教仪式和热闹节日庆典。

source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban
